description_long: This is a knitted beanie hat with a thick, ribbed texture and a soft, flexible structure. The hat features a folded cuff at the base, adding extra warmth and a snug fit around the head. The crown of the hat is slightly pointed and slouches to one side, giving it a relaxed, casual appearance. The knit pattern is consistent throughout, with visible horizontal and vertical ribbing. On the back of the cuff, there is a rectangular patch with text, indicating a brand or logo. The overall color is a uniform dark gray, and the material appears to be a soft, warm yarn, likely acrylic or wool.
description: A dark gray, ribbed knit beanie with a folded cuff and a slouchy, pointed crown, featuring a logo patch on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed knit texture and the folded cuff, with the pointed crown visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slouchy, pointed crown and the thick, ribbed knit pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the logo patch on the cuff and the overall rounded, slouchy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the pointed crown and the consistent ribbed knit texture.
